name: hypot2d
cpp_unit: double hypot2d(double x, double y){ return sqrt(x*x + y*y); }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", hypot2d(3.0,4.0)); printf("%.10g
", hypot2d(5.0,12.0)); printf("%.10g
", hypot2d(1.5,2.5)); return 0; }

name: sigmoid
cpp_unit: double sigmoid(double x){ return 1.0/(1.0 + exp(-x)); }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", sigmoid(0.0)); printf("%.10g
", sigmoid(2.0)); printf("%.10g
", sigmoid(-1.5)); return 0; }

name: clamp01
cpp_unit: double clamp01(double x, double lo, double hi){ if(x<lo) return lo; if(x>hi) return hi; return x; }

name: lerp
cpp_unit: double lerp(double a, double b, double t){ return a + (b - a)*t; }
mojo_unit:
def lerp(a: Float64, b: Float64, t: Float64) -> Float64:
    return a + (b - a) * t

name: smoothstep
cpp_unit: double smoothstep(double e0, double e1, double x){ double t=(x-e0)/(e1-e0); if(t<0.0) t=0.0; if(t>1.0) t=1.0; return t*t*(3.0 - 2.0*t); }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", smoothstep(0.0,1.0,0.5)); printf("%.10g
", smoothstep(0.0,1.0,0.25)); printf("%.10g
", smoothstep(2.0,4.0,3.0)); return 0; }

name: deg2rad
cpp_unit: double deg2rad(double d){ return d * 3.14159265358979323846 / 180.0; }
mojo_unit:
def deg2rad(d: Float64) -> Float64:
    return d * 3.14159265358979323846 / 180.0
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", deg2rad(180.0)); printf("%.10g
", deg2rad(90.0)); printf("%.10g
", deg2rad(45.0)); return 0; }

name: rad2deg
cpp_unit: double rad2deg(double r){ return r * 180.0 / 3.14159265358979323846; }
mojo_unit:
def rad2deg(r: Float64) -> Float64:
    return r * 180.0 / 3.14159265358979323846

name: normalize_angle
cpp_unit: double normalize_angle(double a){ double tau=6.28318530717958647692; double r=fmod(a, tau); if(r<0.0) r+=tau; return r; }
mojo_unit:
from std.math import trunc

def normalize_angle(a: Float64) -> Float64:
    var tau = 6.28318530717958647692
    var r = a - trunc(a / tau) * tau
    if r < 0.0:
        r += tau
    return r
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", normalize_angle(7.0)); printf("%.10g
", normalize_angle(-1.0)); printf("%.10g
", normalize_angle(13.5)); return 0; }

name: distance3d
cpp_unit: double distance3d(double x1,double y1,double z1,double x2,double y2,double z2){ double dx=x2-x1, dy=y2-y1, dz=z2-z1; return sqrt(dx*dx+dy*dy+dz*dz); }
cpp_driver: int main(){ printf("%.10g\n", distance3d(0,0,0,1,2,2)); printf("%.10g\n", distance3d(1,1,1,4,5,1)); return 0; }

name: quadratic_root_max
cpp_unit: double quadratic_root_max(double a,double b,double c){ double disc=b*b-4.0*a*c; double s=sqrt(disc); double r1=(-b+s)/(2.0*a); double r2=(-b-s)/(2.0*a); return r1>r2?r1:r2; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", quadratic_root_max(1.0,-3.0,2.0)); printf("%.10g
", quadratic_root_max(1.0,-5.0,6.0)); printf("%.10g
", quadratic_root_max(2.0,4.0,-6.0)); return 0; }

name: horner_poly
cpp_unit: double horner_poly(double x){ double c[5]={2.0,-3.0,0.5,1.0,-1.0}; double r=0.0; for(int i=0;i<5;i++){ r=r*x + c[i]; } return r; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", horner_poly(1.0)); printf("%.10g
", horner_poly(2.0)); printf("%.10g
", horner_poly(-1.5)); return 0; }

name: celsius_to_fahrenheit
cpp_unit: double celsius_to_fahrenheit(double c){ return c * 9.0/5.0 + 32.0; }
mojo_unit:
def celsius_to_fahrenheit(c: Float64) -> Float64:
    return c * 9.0 / 5.0 + 32.0
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", celsius_to_fahrenheit(0.0)); printf("%.10g
", celsius_to_fahrenheit(100.0)); printf("%.10g
", celsius_to_fahrenheit(37.0)); return 0; }

name: saturation_pressure
cpp_unit: double saturation_pressure(double tc){ return 0.61078 * exp(17.27*tc/(tc+237.3)); }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", saturation_pressure(0.0)); printf("%.10g
", saturation_pressure(25.0)); printf("%.10g
", saturation_pressure(40.0)); return 0; }

name: dew_point
cpp_unit: double dew_point(double tc,double rh){ double g=log(rh/100.0) + 17.27*tc/(237.3+tc); return 237.3*g/(17.27-g); }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", dew_point(25.0,60.0)); printf("%.10g
", dew_point(30.0,80.0)); printf("%.10g
", dew_point(20.0,50.0)); return 0; }

name: rms3
cpp_unit: double rms3(double a,double b,double c){ return sqrt((a*a+b*b+c*c)/3.0); }

name: geometric_mean3
cpp_unit: double geometric_mean3(double a,double b,double c){ return pow(a*b*c, 1.0/3.0); }
mojo_unit:
def geometric_mean3(a: Float64, b: Float64, c: Float64) -> Float64:
    return (a * b * c) ** (1.0 / 3.0)
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", geometric_mean3(1.0,2.0,4.0)); printf("%.10g
", geometric_mean3(2.0,2.0,2.0)); printf("%.10g
", geometric_mean3(1.0,9.0,3.0)); return 0; }

name: harmonic_mean3
cpp_unit: double harmonic_mean3(double a,double b,double c){ return 3.0/(1.0/a + 1.0/b + 1.0/c); }
mojo_unit:
def harmonic_mean3(a: Float64, b: Float64, c: Float64) -> Float64:
    return 3.0 / (1.0 / a + 1.0 / b + 1.0 / c)
cpp_driver: int main(){ printf("%.10g\n", harmonic_mean3(1.0,2.0,4.0)); printf("%.10g\n", harmonic_mean3(2.0,3.0,6.0)); return 0; }

name: stddev4
cpp_unit: double stddev4(double a,double b,double c,double d){ double m=(a+b+c+d)/4.0; double s=(a-m)*(a-m)+(b-m)*(b-m)+(c-m)*(c-m)+(d-m)*(d-m); return sqrt(s/4.0); }

name: newton_step
cpp_unit: double newton_step(double x){ double fx=x*x-2.0; double dfx=2.0*x; return x - fx/dfx; }
mojo_unit:
def newton_step(x: Float64) -> Float64:
    var fx = x * x - 2.0
    var dfx = 2.0 * x
    return x - fx / dfx
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", newton_step(1.0)); printf("%.10g
", newton_step(1.5)); printf("%.10g
", newton_step(2.0)); return 0; }

name: trapezoid_integral
cpp_unit: double trapezoid_integral(double a,double b){ int n=100; double h=(b-a)/n; double s=0.5*(a*a + b*b); for(int i=1;i<n;i++){ double x=a+i*h; s+=x*x; } return s*h; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", trapezoid_integral(0.0,1.0)); printf("%.10g
", trapezoid_integral(0.0,2.0)); printf("%.10g
", trapezoid_integral(1.0,3.0)); return 0; }

name: bisection_sqrt2
cpp_unit: double bisection_sqrt2(double target){ double lo=0.0, hi=target>1.0?target:1.0; for(int i=0;i<60;i++){ double mid=0.5*(lo+hi); if(mid*mid < target) lo=mid; else hi=mid; } return 0.5*(lo+hi); }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", bisection_sqrt2(2.0)); printf("%.10g
", bisection_sqrt2(9.0)); printf("%.10g
", bisection_sqrt2(0.25)); return 0; }

name: exp_decay
cpp_unit: double exp_decay(double n0,double k,double t){ return n0 * exp(-k*t); }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", exp_decay(100.0,0.1,5.0)); printf("%.10g
", exp_decay(50.0,0.5,2.0)); printf("%.10g
", exp_decay(10.0,1.0,0.0)); return 0; }

name: log_interp
cpp_unit: double log_interp(double x0,double y0,double x1,double y1,double x){ double lx0=log(x0), lx1=log(x1), lx=log(x); double t=(lx-lx0)/(lx1-lx0); return y0 + (y1-y0)*t; }

name: wind_chill
cpp_unit: double wind_chill(double tc,double v){ double vp=pow(v,0.16); return 13.12 + 0.6215*tc - 11.37*vp + 0.3965*tc*vp; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", wind_chill(-5.0,20.0)); printf("%.10g
", wind_chill(0.0,30.0)); printf("%.10g
", wind_chill(5.0,10.0)); return 0; }

name: round_to_decimals
cpp_unit: double round_to_decimals(double x,int n){ double p=pow(10.0,n); return round(x*p)/p; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", round_to_decimals(3.14159,2)); printf("%.10g
", round_to_decimals(2.71828,3)); printf("%.10g
", round_to_decimals(123.456,1)); return 0; }

name: percentage_error
cpp_unit: double percentage_error(double approx,double exact){ double e=(approx-exact)/exact; if(e<0.0) e=-e; return e*100.0; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", percentage_error(99.0,100.0)); printf("%.10g
", percentage_error(105.0,100.0)); printf("%.10g
", percentage_error(3.14,3.14159)); return 0; }

name: tanh_activation
cpp_unit: double tanh_activation(double x){ double e=exp(2.0*x); return (e-1.0)/(e+1.0) + 0.5; }

int main(){ printf("%.10g
", tanh_activation(0.0)); printf("%.10g

", tanh_activation(-0.5)); return 0; }

name: hypotenuse_angle
